title: Drive-By-Wire with Sable
description: Port Drive-By-Wire Mod to Sable. Control your Sable vehicles via Cables
body:
Have you ever had your redstone links conflict? Wanted to build a car without those antenna sticking out the floor?

Well, here's the perfect product for you! Introducing Drive-By-Wire Cables, a tried-and-true way of connecting your vehicles without any shenanigans involved.

## Why should you use Cables over redstone links on ships?
- No links all over your build in awkward places
- No need to remember if your door control frequency is button+door, grass+door or netherite sword+door
- No need to have a million colored blocks in your inventory
- No conflicts ever (the best part!)
- Compatibility with lecterns so your vehicle Cables are neat and tidy
Why wait? Try Cables today!

## Compatibility Notes

- Tweaked Controllers: Lectern is compatible!

## Credits
- Drive By Wire Mod From [drive-by-wire](https://modrinth.com/mod/drive-by-wire)
- Textures and models derived from [Create Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)
